title: Joe's Netherier Netherite
description: A texture pack that makes 'Nether'ite resemble its name.
body: A texture pack that resemble **my imagination of what netherite should have looked like on release**. As its found in the nether and _the nether is like filled with fire_, all this pack does is make **netherite more of a darker and molten metal and making the armour trims a cooled dark red magma colour** to make it netherier.
